title: Pushword Quiz
description: A quiz declared inline in a page via {% quiz %}…{% endquiz %} (raw JSON body) or {{ quiz('…json…') }} (single-quoted Twig string). The Symfony Validator on the Quiz model is the source of truth; this schema mirrors its structure as an authoring aid. Two modes: a knowledge quiz (default) scored on `correct` answers, or a personality test (`mode: profile`) where answers carry `weights` toward named `profiles` and the highest-tallied one wins. Cross-field rules this schema cannot fully express: a quiz needs `questions` unless it delegates them to `levels`; in the default mode each question needs at least one `correct` answer; in `mode: profile` it needs at least one `profile` and every answer weight must reference a declared profile key; a `video` requires both `media` (used as the poster) and `alt`.

mode.description: "quiz" (default): scored on correct answers. "profile": a personality test scored on answer weights toward named profiles.

difficulty.description: Free label shown as a badge, e.g. "Easy".

feedback.description: Ignored in mode:profile (always scored at the end).

cta.description: A registered pushword/conversation form type shown at the end (e.g. "newsletter"). Ignored if conversation is not installed.

pass.description: Score %% needed to pass a level and reveal the next-level button (default 50). Knowledge quiz only.

label.description: Tab label for a difficulty level; falls back to `difficulty`.

profiles.description: Possible outcomes of a personality test (mode:profile).

levels.description: Difficulty levels, each a full leaf quiz (no nested levels). The root keeps the shared metadata. Knowledge quiz only — not used in mode:profile.

labels.description: Overrides for the locale-defaulted UI words.

media.description: Image filename; also the poster when `video` is set.

correct.description: Knowledge quiz: marks an expected answer.

weights.description: Personality test: profile key => points this answer contributes.

profile.description: Personality test shorthand: profile key worth 1 point (== weights {key: 1}).
A personality-test outcome. The answer weights tally toward its `key`; the highest wins.

level.description: A difficulty level: like the root quiz but with its own questions/results, inheriting feedback/cta/ctaTitle/pass/labels/results when omitted. Any nested `levels` are ignored.
